name: morgrem
flavor_texts: When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it’s trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair.
With sly cunning, it tries to lure people into the woods. Some believe it to have the power to make crops grow.
text: Morgrem is the Devious Pokémon. It is a dark and fairy-type Pokémon. Abilities: prankster, frisk, pickpocket (hidden). Base stats — HP: 65, Attack: 60, Defense: 45, Sp. Atk: 75, Sp. Def: 55, Speed: 70. Evolution line: impidimp → morgrem → grimmsnarl. Lore: When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it’s trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair. With sly cunning, it tries to lure people into the woods. Some believe it to have the power to make crops grow.
